description_long: This is a detailed model of a large, slender animal with elongated limbs and a long, narrow tail. The body is streamlined, with a pronounced ribcage and a head that tapers to a pointed snout. The legs are extended in a dynamic pose, suggesting movement or leaping, and the tail is stretched out behind, adding to the sense of motion. The surface texture appears leathery and smooth, with subtle muscle definition visible along the flanks and limbs. The coloration is a uniform, muted brown, resembling the natural tones of many wild mammals. The overall form and proportions are reminiscent of a large predatory mammal, such as a cheetah or similar feline.
description: A slender, elongated wild animal with extended limbs and a long tail, posed as if leaping. The surface is smooth and brown, with visible muscle definition.
description_view_0: The animal is seen from a rear three-quarter angle, highlighting the curve of the back, the base of the tail, and the extended hind limbs.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the body and tail, with all four limbs visible and the animal stretched out in a leaping pose.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizing the narrowness of the body and the alignment of the limbs and tail along the animal's axis.
description_view_3: Another side view from the opposite direction, displaying the animal's head, chest, and the outstretched forelimbs and tail.
